raw_description:
Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, and city views. Additional amenities include free WiFi, work desks, and soundproofing.Dining Options:The family-friendly restaurant offers international cuisine with halal, vegetarian, and vegan options. Guests can enjoy brunch, lunch, and dinner in a modern ambience.Leisure Facilities:An infinity swimming pool with a view, fitness room, and kids' club provide relaxation and entertainment for all ages.Convenient Location:Located 2 km from Dubai International Airport, the hotel provides a shuttle service and connectivity to key attractions such as Burj Khalifa and Dubai Mall.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.6for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at ibis Styles Dubai Airport Hotel. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
